Localization.Description: A likely attempt to add malicious code to system files

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A likely attempt to add malicious code to system files on host {event_src.host} was detected
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to system files on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to system file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
A likely attempt to add malicious code to system file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host} was detected
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to system file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} likely attempted to add malicious code to system files on host {event_src.host}
